message:
feat(storage): Cx-first next-4 hot-path siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Continue the tick 114/115 storage cx-first sweep with the next 4
hot-path entry points from the callsite-count ranking:

1. `upsert_workflow_with_cx(cx, workflow)` — 18+ callsites
   (second most-called business mutation, workflow state writes).
2. `record_audit_action_with_cx(cx, action)` — 14+ callsites
   (audit-trail emission hot path).
3. `get_audit_actions_with_cx(cx, query)` — 14+ callsites
   (operator-facing audit-history read).
4. `get_step_logs_with_cx(cx, workflow_id)` — 16+ callsites
   (workflow observability read: diagnostic bundles, CLI history).

All four are pre-flight-checkpoint delegates to the legacy methods.
Reads that route through `spawn_blocking_storage_with_join_error`
keep that path unchanged; writes that route through the writer
channel keep that path unchanged. The cx seam is strictly additive.

Legacy methods preserved unchanged.

Regression test `storage_tick116_hot_path_siblings_roundtrip`
pins the combined contract: seed a pane, then exercise all four
cx-first siblings in sequence — upsert_workflow_with_cx, record an
audit action via _with_cx, read it back via get_audit_actions_with_cx
(verify audit_id matches), read empty step logs via
get_step_logs_with_cx. Shutdown via shutdown_with_cx.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target, --features asupersync-runtime): 477/477
storage tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage now at 9/140 methods (new, with_config,
upsert_pane, record_event, shutdown, upsert_workflow,
record_audit_action, get_audit_actions, get_step_logs). Covers
startup + top 7 business method callsites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
